privileged_info_summary: OSCAR EMR is a real open-source electronic medical record system developed at McMaster University. The task involves adding a chart alert to a synthetically created patient record (Robert Williams, DOB: 1942-07-18) using real OSCAR credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN 1117). The alert text contains verified key phrases including medical information (hard of hearing, speak slowly) and a fictional contact phone number (905-555-0173, where 555 is the reserved prefix for test/fictional numbers per the North American Numbering Plan). The patient data is synthetic and created by the task setup script.
